name: Mchamburger Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Place vanilla wafers on a surface, with the flat side up.
2. In a plastic food bag, knead coconut with enough green food coloring to tint it the color of shredded lettuce.
3. Put 1/3 of frosting into a small bowl and add just enough water to thin it to the consistency of buttermilk (pourable). Add a few drops of yellow food coloring to resemble the color of American cheese.
4. Place a dab of frosting on the flat side of each vanilla wafer, then a bit of tinted coconut.
5. Place a Keebler cookie on top of that with a little frosting and cover with the flat side of another vanilla wafer, applying gentle pressure to force some of the frosting to drip over the sides like melted cheese.
6. Wipe the top of each assembled cookie with beaten egg white and sprinkle with sesame seeds before the egg white dries.
7. Let stand at room temperature until firm or set. Wrap each cookie in paper used to wrap McDonald's hamburgers. Store at room temperature, covered, for up to a week or two.
